prompt_text: Braintrust vs PromptFoo pricing and features
response:
**Promptfoo** is the cheaper option if you want an **open-source, self-hostable** LLM eval/security tool; **Braintrust** is a **commercial freemium SaaS** geared more toward production observability, experimentation, and team workflows.[1][2][6]

| Category | Promptfoo | Braintrust |
|---|---|---|
| **Pricing** | **Free forever** community edition; enterprise/on-prem are custom-priced.[2] | **Freemium** with a free tier; paid plans are custom/call-for-quote in the sources provided, with third-party comparisons citing a Pro plan starting around **$249/month**.[1][3][5] |
| **License / model** | **Open-source** (MIT).[1][2] | **Proprietary / commercial**.[6] |
| **Core focus** | Prompt and model evaluation, side-by-side comparison, red-teaming, and vulnerability scanning.[1][2][5] | Evaluation-first platform with observability, production tracing, dataset management, and CI/CD integration.[1][3][7] |
| **Deployment** | Run locally, self-host, or use enterprise/on-prem deployment.[2] | SaaS-oriented; the sources emphasize cloud/freemium usage and production workflows.[1][3][7] |
| **Red-teaming** | Community includes **10k probes/month** free; enterprise can raise limits.[2] | Included as part of the broader evaluation platform, but the provided sources do not give a comparable free probe allowance.[1][3] |
| **Observability / tracing** | Has tracing and evaluation reports, but it is mainly positioned as an eval/security tool.[1][2] | Stronger emphasis on **LLM tracing**, observability, and production-to-testing workflows.[1][3][7] |
| **Collaboration / governance** | Enterprise adds team sharing, centralized dashboards, SSO, granular permissions, and API access.[2] | Strong team/production workflow positioning, with dataset management and integrated experimentation.[1][3] |

**Best choice by use case:**
- Choose **Promptfoo** if you want **free/open-source**, need to **self-host**, or care most about **prompt testing, red-teaming, and model comparisons**.[2][5][6]
- Choose **Braintrust** if you want a more **batteries-included SaaS** for **production observability, experiment tracking, dataset workflows, and team collaboration**.[1][3][7]

A key nuance is that the exact **Braintrust pricing** is less explicit in the official sources provided, while third-party comparisons cite a **Pro** tier starting around **$249/month** and describe Braintrust’s pricing as multi-dimensional or custom.[3][5] Promptfoo’s pricing is clearer: the community version is **free forever**, with enterprise and on-prem priced by quote.[2]
